mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_profiles (user_id) SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} AND role = 'COMPANY' AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT cp.id, cp.user_id, u.email, u.phone, cp.company_name, cp.business_number, cp.industry, cp.company_size, cp.website_url, cp.logo_file_id, f.file_url AS logo_url, cp.description, cp.address, cp.verification_status FROM company_profiles cp JOIN users u ON u.id = cp.user_id LEFT JOIN files f ON f.id = cp.logo_file_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND u.role = 'COMPANY' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE company_profiles SET company_name = #{request.companyName}, business_number = #{request.businessNumber}, industry = #{request.industry}, company_size = #{request.companySize}, website_url = #{request.websiteUrl}, logo_file_id = #{request.logoFileId}, description = #{request.description}, address = #{request.address}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users u WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.role = 'COMPANY' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL )
